description: Canonical record of all swarm proposals. Source of truth — Telegram is delivery only.

proposals.title: Splitting Monolithic Database Migrations for Improved Reliability
proposals.ceo_decision: Auto-approved by CTO: Already done — supabase/migrations/ has 20 atomic files

proposals.title: Implement Input Validation and Rate Limiting for API Endpoints
proposals.ceo_decision: Auto-approved by CTO: Already done — rate limiting + input validation deployed

proposals.title: Refactor to atomic migrations
proposals.ceo_decision: Auto-approved by CTO: Already done — 22 atomic migration files

proposals.title: Implement Atomic Migrations for Supabase Database
Optimize Database Indexing for Reduced API Latency
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO: Already done in migration #21 — composite indexes on aura_scores(visibility), aura_scores(total_score DESC WHERE public), sharing_permissions(user_id, org_id)

proposals.title: Unvalidated API Endpoints Exposure with Missing Rate Limiting
proposals.ceo_decision: Auto-approved by CTO: Already done — rate limiting deployed

proposals.title: Implement End-to-End Testing for Critical Flows
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO approved: Valid. Aligns with Mistake #16 (zero frontend tests). Add to Sprint 10 backlog.

proposals.title: End-to-End Testing for Critical Flows (merged with 00b8e290)
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO: Merged with proposal 00b8e290. Same scope.

proposals.title: Integrate Agent Validation for Content Review
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO approved: Matches BEST-PRACTICES.md rule #16. Agent review before CEO delivery. Add to standard workflow.

proposals.title: Implement API Gateway with Load Balancing for Scalability
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO dismissed: Premature. We have 2 users. Railway handles single-instance scaling fine to 5K users. Revisit at 1K+ concurrent users.

proposals.title: Implement Input Validation for API Endpoints to Prevent SQL Injection
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO: Already done. Pydantic v2 validators on ALL inputs (UUID, slug, answer sanitization). Supabase SDK prevents raw SQL injection. Agent referenced JS libraries (Joi, express-validator) — we use Python/Pydantic. Agent context needs update.

proposals.title: Enhance Assessment UX with Adaptive Prompts and Response Quality Middleware
proposals.ceo_decision: CTO approved: Good idea. Defer to Phase 2 (Transparent Evaluation Logs). Adaptive prompts align with IRT engine. Quality middleware exists partially (BARS evaluator).
